function.name: computer_use
function.description: Control computer input devices (keyboard and mouse) and capture screen information

action.description: The action to perform with the computer input devices or screen capture

enumDescriptions.key: Press a key or key-combination on the keyboard. This supports xdotool's `key` syntax. Examples: "a", "Return", "alt+Tab", "ctrl+s", "Up", "KP_0" (for the numpad 0 key)
enumDescriptions.type: Type a string of text on the keyboard
enumDescriptions.cursor_position: Get the current (x, y) pixel coordinate of the cursor on the screen
enumDescriptions.mouse_move: Move the cursor to a specified (x, y) pixel coordinate on the screen
enumDescriptions.left_click_drag: Click and drag the cursor to a specified (x, y) pixel coordinate on the screen
enumDescriptions.screenshot: Take a screenshot of the screen

coordinate.description: (x, y): The x (pixels from the left edge) and y (pixels from the top edge) coordinates to move the mouse to. Required only by `action=mouse_move` and `action=left_click_drag`.

function.name: switch_tab
function.description: Call this function to switch the active browser tab to a new one

tab_id.description: The ID of the tab to switch to

function.name: stop_browsing
function.description: Call this function when you have achieved the goal of the task.

error.description: The error message if the task was not successful
